verses.text: Tua hunin Filistia-te in Israel-te a sim dingin a galkapte khawm uh hi. Akhish in David kiangah, “Nang leh na mite, kei tawh galkapte lakah a kuankhawm ding na hihlam thei in,” a ci hi

David in Akhish kiangah, “Hoih mahmah hi; na nasempa in bang hih thei hiam, cih na thei ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Akhish in David kiangah, “Hoih mahmah hi; khan' tawntungin keimah a hong cing dingin nang kong koih ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tu-in Samuel si khin a, Israel-te khempeuh ama hangin kapin, ama khuapi Ramah-ah vui uh hi. Saul in vankahte leh aisante a gamsung panin beisak hi
Filistia-te kikhawm uh a, hong pai-in Shunem-ah giahphual sat uh hi. Saul in Israel-te khempeuh khawm a, amaute in Gilboa-ah giahphual sat uh hi
Saul in Filistia galkapte a muh ciangin lau a, a lungsim nakpi takin ling hi
Saul in Topa tungah thu a dot ciangin, Topa in mang tawh hita leh, Urim tawh hita leh, kamsangte tawh hita leh dawnglo hi

Tua ciangin Saul in a nasemte kiangah, “Ama kiangah pai-in ama tung pan thu ka dot theihna dingin vankahthei numei khat kei-a' dingin hong zon'sak un,” a ci hi. A nasemte in ama kiangah, “En in, Endor-ah vankahthei khat om hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin Saul in a meel seelin puan dang silh a, amah leh mi nih pai hi. Amaute zanin tua numei kiangah va pai uh hi. Amah in, “Kei-a' dingin a sisate' kha kiang pan thu hong dotsak in la, nang kianga a min kong gen peuhpeuh kei-a' dingin hong saptohsak in,” a ci hi

Numei in ama kiangah, “Saul' hihsa thu, gamsung panin vankahte leh aisante a suksiatna na thei taktak hi. Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin keima sihna ding a piangsak dingin kei-a' dingin thangzak hong koih na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Ahih hangin ama tungah Topa' min tawh Saul kiciam a, “ Topa a nungta ahih mah bangin hih thu hangin nang tungah gimna hong tung hetlo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin numei in, “Kua hong sapsak ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Samuel hong sapsak in,” a ci hi
Numei in Samuel a muh ciangin a gingin kikokhia hi. Numei in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin kei hong khem na hi hiam? Nang, Saul na hi hi,” a ci hi
Kumpipa in ama kiangah, “Lau kei in; kua mu na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Numei in Saul kiangah, “Leisung panin pasian khat hong paikhiato ka mu hi,” a ci hi

Amah in tuanu kiangah, “Ama meel bangci ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tuanu in, “Puteek khat hong paito a, amah in puantualpi silh hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Saul in tua pen Samuel hi, ci-in thei a, lei-ah a maikunin zahtakna a bawl hi

Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul kiangah, “Bang hangin keimah saptohna tawh hong nawngkaisak na hi hiam?” a ci hi. Saul in dawngin, “Nakpi takin ka lungkham hi; Filistia-te in kei hong sim a, kei kiang panin Pasian kiheikhia-in kamsangte tawh ahi a, mang tawh ahi zongin hong dawng nawnlo hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka gamtatna ding zia a hong gen dingin nang kong sam hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in, “ Topa, nang kiang panin kiheikhia-in na gal suak khin ahih ciangin bang hangin kei thu hong dong lai na hi hiam
Topa in kei' tung tawnin hong gensa bangin nang tungah hong hih hi. Topa in na khutsung panin kumpi gam balkhia-in na vengpa David' tungah pia khin hi
Nangmah in Topa' thu ngailoin, Amalek tungah ama heh mahmahna tawh kizui-in hihlo na hih manin Topa in nang tungah tuni-in hihte hong tungsak hi

Tua thamloin Topa in Israel mite zong nang tawh Filistia-te' khutsungah hong piakhawm ding hi. Zing ciangin nang leh na tapate in zong kei kiang nong zuan ding uh hi. Topa in Israel galkapte zong Filistia-te' khutsungah pia ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel' thugente hangin lau lua-in leilakah Saul tawnpuk pah hi. Amah in sun tawntung leh zan tawntung bangmah nelo ahih manin a tha neem mahmah hi

Tua ciangin Saul kiangah a numei hong pai-in amah a lau mahmahna a muh ciangin tuanu in Saul kiangah, “En in, na nasemnu in na thu hong ngaizo hi. Ka luang khamin, kei tungah nong gen bangin ka gamtazo hi
Tua ahih ciangin nang zong na nasemnu' thu hong ngai in; na mai-ah anlum tawmkhat hong luisak in; na paina dingah na pai ciangin na thahatna dingin ne in,” a ci hi

Amah in nial a, “Ka ne kei ding hi,” a ci hi. Ahih hangin tua numei tawh kopin a nasemte in ci teitei uh ahih manin amau' cih bangin a mang hi. Tua ahih ciangin leilak panin amah tho-in lupna tungah a tu hi
Tu-in tua numei in a inn-ah bawngno thau khat nei a, amah in manlang takin go-in, tua ciangin annel la a, a annel meekin silngo sawhloh anlum em a
Saul leh a nasemte' mai-ah lui a, amaute in a ne uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute dingin tua zanin a paikhia uh hi.
